variables.name: API_BASE_URL
variables.rationale: API route exposed to app/frontends
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: AUTH_COOKIE_DOMAIN
variables.rationale: Conventional app auth cookie domain fallback for standard auth.
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: AUTH_EMAIL_FROM
variables.rationale: Conventional app auth sender fallback for standard auth.
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: CI
variables.rationale: Conventional CI marker used to disable interactive console behavior.
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: CLICOLOR_FORCE
variables.rationale: Standard terminal color control.
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: DATABASE_URL
variables.rationale: Conventional database URL. Managed dev Postgres does not inject this into app, setup, DB setup, or worker environments; prefer `DatabaseURL` for Onlava apps.
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: DatabaseURL
variables.rationale: onlava app-style database URL env and managed app database authority. Used when `auth.database_url_env` is `DatabaseURL`
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ELECTRIC_INSECURE
variables.rationale: Electric container setting injected for local managed Electric processes.
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ELECTRIC_PORT
variables.rationale: Electric container port injected into managed Electric processes.
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ELECTRIC_REPLICATION_STREAM_ID
variables.rationale: Electric replication stream ID. onlava sets a deterministic session-scoped default
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ELECTRIC_URL
variables.rationale: Public Electric route for app/frontends
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ELECTRIC_USAGE_REPORTING
variables.rationale: Electric container setting injected for local managed Electric processes.
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: GF_
variables.rationale: Grafana child-process environment family. onlava filters ambient GF_* values and injects only owned settings unless explicitly preserving them.
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: GF_PATHS_DATA
variables.rationale: Grafana data directory
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: GF_PATHS_LOGS
variables.rationale: Grafana logs directory
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: GF_PATHS_PLUGINS
variables.rationale: Grafana plugins directory
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: GF_PATHS_PROVISIONING
variables.rationale: Grafana provisioning directory
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: GF_SERVER_HTTP_ADDR
variables.rationale: Grafana child loopback bind address
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: GF_SERVER_HTTP_PORT
variables.rationale: Grafana child loopback bind port
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: GF_SERVER_ROOT_URL
variables.rationale: Grafana public root URL
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: HOME
variables.rationale: Host home directory used by browser discovery fallback.
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: JWT_SECRET
variables.rationale: Conventional app JWT signing secret fallback for standard auth.
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: NO_COLOR
variables.rationale: Standard terminal color opt-out.
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_AGENT_DISABLE
variables.rationale: `1` disables local agent usage. `onlava up --detach` requires this to be unset
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_AGENT_HOME
variables.rationale: Overrides the machine-wide local agent home. Default is `~/.onlava`
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_AGENT_ROUTER_ADDR
variables.rationale: Overrides the agent router listen address. Default is `127.0.0.1:9440`
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_AGENT_ROUTER_TLS
variables.rationale: `0` disables HTTPS routing; `1` forces HTTPS. Default is HTTPS
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_AGENT_SOCKET
variables.rationale: Overrides the agent Unix control socket path
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_AGENT_TRUST
variables.rationale: `1` asks the agent to trust the existing local onlava CA when starting HTTPS routing
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_API_BASE_URL
variables.rationale: onlava-prefixed API route exposed to app/frontends
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_APP_ID
variables.rationale: Base app identity from `.onlava.json`
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_APP_ROOT
variables.rationale: Absolute app root path
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_APP_ROOT_HASH
variables.rationale: Stable hash of the app root path
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_AUTH_COOKIE_DOMAIN
variables.rationale: Auth cookie domain; empty in default local agent dev
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_AUTH_DATABASE_URL
variables.rationale: Fallback DB URL for standard auth when app-specific envs are unset
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_AUTH_EMAIL_FROM
variables.rationale: Fallback sender address for standard auth email flows when `auth.email_from_env` and `AUTH_EMAIL_FROM` are unset
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_AUTH_JWT_SECRET
variables.rationale: Fallback JWT signing secret for standard auth when `auth.jwt_secret_env` and `JWT_SECRET` are unset
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_BASE_APP_ID
variables.rationale: Base app ID for a session
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_BIN
variables.rationale: Target-app helper override for the onlava binary path
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_BRANCH
variables.rationale: Git branch captured for the dev session
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_BUILD_ID
variables.rationale: Worker build ID. Agent dev uses the session ID
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_CORS_ALLOW_ORIGINS
variables.rationale: Comma-separated production CORS allowlist outside dev endpoint mode
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_DEV_CACHE_DIR
variables.rationale: Overrides build/dashboard cache root. This does not change agent home
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_DEV_DASHBOARD_ADDR
variables.rationale: Overrides the dashboard backend address used by dev sessions. Normally allocated automatically
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_DEV_DASHBOARD_UI_DIR
variables.rationale: Overrides the built dashboard UI directory used by the dashboard backend
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_DEV_DETACHED_CHILD
variables.rationale: Marks the background child used by `onlava up --detach`
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_DEV_ELECTRIC_BIN
variables.rationale: Explicit local Electric binary path; onlava does not search `PATH` for it
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_DEV_ELECTRIC_UPSTREAM
variables.rationale: Explicit Electric upstream; onlava registers it as the session Electric backend
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_DEV_ENDPOINTS
variables.rationale: `1` enables dev/admin endpoints such as `/__onlava/config` and `/debug/pprof/*`
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_DEV_GRAFANA
variables.rationale: `auto`, `1`, or `0`. Default `auto` starts Grafana when possible
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_DEV_GRAFANA_DOWNLOAD
variables.rationale: `0` disables automatic Grafana managed-toolchain downloads
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_DEV_NEON_SELFHOST_DRIVER
variables.rationale: Explicit external neon-selfhost branch driver executable path for overriding the built-in self-hosted Neon dev-cell backend
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json for stable provider configuration; this env is a development escape hatch and the normal dev-cell driver is built into onlava

variables.name: ONLAVA_NEON_SELFHOST_ROOT
variables.rationale: Injected into the managed neon-selfhost driver so driver-owned backend state uses the same local substrate root as onlava db neon commands
variables.preferred_surface: internal CLI-to-driver handoff; users should not set it directly

variables.name: ONLAVA_DEV_LOCAL_POSTGRES_BRANCH_DRIVER
variables.rationale: Explicit local-postgres-branch development fallback executable path for branch pin/lease/env validation against local Postgres-shaped endpoints
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json for stable provider configuration; this env is not the actual neon-selfhost dev-cell backend

variables.name: ONLAVA_DEV_OBSERVABILITY_BACKEND
variables.rationale: Current dev observability backend, for example `victoria`
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_DEV_POSTGRES_ADMIN_URL
variables.rationale: Explicit admin Postgres URL for the managed dev database planner
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_DEV_POSTGRES_BIN
variables.rationale: Explicit local `postgres` binary path; onlava does not search `PATH` for it
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_DEV_POSTGRES_EXTERNAL
variables.rationale: `1` keeps an explicit external `DatabaseURL` instead of creating a managed session database. External mode requires `DatabaseURL`; `DATABASE_URL` is ignored as the app database authority.
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_DEV_POSTGRES_INITDB
variables.rationale: Explicit local `initdb` binary path; onlava does not search `PATH` for it
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_DEV_REPORT_TOKEN
variables.rationale: Token used by the app child to report logs/traces to the dev dashboard
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_DEV_REPORT_URL
variables.rationale: Dev dashboard report endpoint
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_DEV_SUPERVISOR
variables.rationale: Marks a child process launched by `onlava up`
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_DEV_SUPERVISOR_PID
variables.rationale: Parent dev supervisor PID
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_DEV_VICTORIA
variables.rationale: `0` disables Victoria sidecars
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_DEV_VICTORIA_DIR
variables.rationale: Overrides Victoria runtime state root. Managed binaries still live under `.onlava/toolchain/` or `ONLAVA_TOOLCHAIN_DIR`
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_DEV_VICTORIA_DOWNLOAD
variables.rationale: `0` disables automatic Victoria managed-toolchain downloads
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_DISABLE_FRONTEND_PROXY
variables.rationale: Disables frontend proxy/upstream discovery in the legacy local proxy outside the normal onlava up path
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_ELECTRIC_URL
variables.rationale: onlava-prefixed Electric route
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_ENV
variables.rationale: App environment name such as `development`, `test`, or `production`
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_FRONTEND_
variables.rationale: Dynamic prefix used to build ONLAVA_FRONTEND_<NAME>_ADDR manual frontend upstream overrides.
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_FRONTEND_*_ADDR
variables.rationale: Manual frontend upstream override, for example `ONLAVA_FRONTEND_PULSE_ADDR=127.0.0.1:4321`
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_GRAFANA_BIN
variables.rationale: Explicit Grafana binary path
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_GRAFANA_DIR
variables.rationale: Overrides Grafana runtime state root. Managed binaries still live under `.onlava/toolchain/` or `ONLAVA_TOOLCHAIN_DIR`
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_GRAFANA_DOWNLOAD_SHA256
variables.rationale: Checksum for a custom Grafana download
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_GRAFANA_DOWNLOAD_URL
variables.rationale: Custom Grafana archive URL
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_GRAFANA_HOME
variables.rationale: Overrides Grafana home for an explicit binary or custom download path
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_GRAFANA_PLUGINS_PREINSTALL_SYNC
variables.rationale: Comma-separated Grafana plugin install list
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_GRAFANA_PORT
variables.rationale: Preferred Grafana loopback port
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_GRAFANA_PRESERVE_GF_ENV
variables.rationale: `1` allows ambient `GF_*` variables through to Grafana
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_GRAFANA_PUBLIC_URL
variables.rationale: Overrides advertised Grafana browser URL
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_GRAFANA_REUSE_EXTERNAL
variables.rationale: `1` allows reusing an externally managed Grafana
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_GRAFANA_VERSION
variables.rationale: Overrides the pinned Grafana version
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_INTEGRATION_
variables.rationale: Prefix reserved for integration-test-only process controls.
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_LISTEN_ADDR
variables.rationale: Runtime listen address or Unix socket path
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_LISTEN_NETWORK
variables.rationale: Runtime listen network, usually `unix` in agent dev or `tcp` otherwise
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_LOCAL_PROXY
variables.rationale: `1` is rejected by normal onlava up; retained for legacy local proxy internals and tests
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_LOCAL_PROXY_HTTPS_PORT
variables.rationale: Overrides the legacy local proxy HTTPS port outside the normal onlava up path
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_LOCAL_PROXY_HTTP_PORT
variables.rationale: Overrides the legacy local proxy HTTP port outside the normal onlava up path
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_LOCAL_PROXY_SKIP_TRUST_INSTALL
variables.rationale: `1` skips local CA trust installation for the legacy local proxy outside the normal onlava up path
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_LOGS_BACKEND
variables.rationale: Selects the dev-event backend for logs, attach, TUI, and console when debugging the VictoriaLogs read path.
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_LOG_FORMAT
variables.rationale: Runtime log format selected by CLI flags or env
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_MANAGED_DATABASE_NAME
variables.rationale: Name of the managed per-session Postgres database
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_MANAGED_DATABASE_URL
variables.rationale: Managed per-session Postgres URL exposed for tooling/debugging
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_PARENT_MONITOR
variables.rationale: Enables runtime parent monitoring
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_PARENT_MONITOR_PID
variables.rationale: Parent PID watched by runtime parent monitoring
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_PUBLIC_APP_URL
variables.rationale: Public app URL for auth and app code
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_PUBLIC_BASE_URL
variables.rationale: Public API base URL advertised to app code
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_RELEASE_GATE_EXTERNAL_APP_ROOT
variables.rationale: Optional external app root for release-gate smoke validation
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_RELEASE_GATE_LOG_DIR
variables.rationale: Release-gate log directory override
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_ONLV_SMOKE_LOG_DIR
variables.rationale: Log directory override for the ONLV two-worktree release-gate smoke
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_ONLV_SMOKE_ROOT
variables.rationale: ONLV checkout root for the two-worktree release-gate smoke
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_ROLE
variables.rationale: Generated binary role: `all`, `api`, or `worker`
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_RUNTIME_APP_ID
variables.rationale: Session-qualified runtime app ID
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_RUNTIME_ENV
variables.rationale: Runtime environment name used by onlava internals
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_SESSION_ID
variables.rationale: Agent session ID for local dev
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_SHADCN_OVERWRITE
variables.rationale: `1` permits overwrite operations in the dashboard shadcn wrapper
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_SHADCN_REGISTRY_ROOT
variables.rationale: UI registry root override for the dashboard shadcn wrapper
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_SHADCN_VERSION
variables.rationale: shadcn CLI version override for the dashboard wrapper
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_STANDALONE_DEV
variables.rationale: Marks a generated runtime process started in standalone dev mode
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_TEMPORAL_BIN
variables.rationale: Explicit Temporal CLI binary path for local dev server and deployment admin commands. Without this, onlava uses the managed toolchain artifact
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_TEMPORAL_DEPLOYMENT_NAME
variables.rationale: Temporal Worker Deployment name override
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_TEMPORAL_HOST_RESOURCE_REPORTING
variables.rationale: `0` disables Temporal Go SDK host resource reporting. Enabled by default
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_TEMPORAL_TASK_QUEUE
variables.rationale: Worker task queue override; `onlava worker --task-queue` sets it
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_TEMPORAL_TASK_QUEUE_PREFIX
variables.rationale: Overrides generated Temporal task queue prefix. Agent dev sets this to a session-scoped value

variables.name: ONLAVA_TEMPORAL_VERSIONING_BEHAVIOR
variables.rationale: `pinned` or `auto_upgrade`; default is `pinned`

variables.name: ONLAVA_TEST_
variables.rationale: Prefix reserved for test-only process controls.

variables.name: ONLAVA_TEST_DATABASE_URL
variables.rationale: PostgreSQL admin URL for integration tests that need a real database; tests create package-scoped databases from it

variables.name: ONLAVA_TEST_WATCH_BACKUP_POLL_MS
variables.rationale: Integration-test escape hatch read by the dev watcher to shorten the backup polling path when fsnotify events are missed during process-level reload tests.
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_TEST_WATCH_POLL_MS
variables.rationale: Integration-test escape hatch read by the dev watcher to shorten file snapshot polling during process-level reload tests.
variables.preferred_surface: .onlava.json, explicit CLI flags, or onlava.toolchain.json for stable non-secret configuration

variables.name: ONLAVA_TEST_WATCH_SETTLE_DELAY_MS
variables.rationale: Integration-test escape hatch read by the dev watcher to shorten file-watch debounce timing during process-level reload tests.
